name: Beach Day Episode
description:
Requested!

Set in the post-escape setting, the Forsaken Cast has a beach day episode! Complete with fanservice for all your favourites!

Characters:

Noob, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Shedletsky, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar, Azure, Slasher, John Doe, Mafioso (& group), Gasharpoon, 1x1x1x1, Noli, MrDoombringer, Guest 666/Sixer.

Included:

Daisy, Charlotte, Jane Doe.

Before you have fun in the sun with all the gang, hydrate yourself, and do a stretch before someone inevitably tackles you into the tide pools.
creator: Subconscious
